text: Hydrostatic pressure: P = rho * g * d, where rho is fluid density [kg/m³], g is gravitational acceleration [m/s²], d is depth [m]. Returns pressure in Pa.
Buoyancy force: F_b = rho * g * V, where rho is fluid density [kg/m³], g is gravitational acceleration [m/s²], V is displaced volume [m³]. Returns force in N.
